hero.para: Gram Panchayat Office Savarla, Taluka Pawni, Dist Bhandara is a local self-government body working for the holistic development of the village. Our main objective is to provide various government services, development works, and welfare schemes to villagers.

about.title: Gram Panchayat Introduction
about.para1: Gram Panchayat Office Savarla, Taluka Pawni, Dist Bhandara is working for holistic village development. Established in 1958. Our main objective is to provide various government services, development works, and welfare schemes.
about.para2: Savarla is a progressive and agricultural village in Bhandara district. The main occupation is agriculture, and rice is the main crop. The village is constantly progressing in social, cultural, and educational fields.
about.mission: Gram Panchayat Office Savarla — Committed to transparent administration and village development.
about.name: Gram Panchayat Savarla

video.title: Video Gallery — Village Intro & Gram Sabha Videos

2009.title: Jal Jeevan Mission
2009.para: Clean drinking water tap connections provided to every household in Savarla village.

2014.title: Road Development
2014.para: Development works through roads, water supply, sanitation, public facilities, and government schemes.

2019.title: Swachh Bharat Abhiyan
2019.para: Toilets and cleanliness drives are implemented for every family under Swachh Bharat Mission.

2024.title: PM Awas Yojana
2024.para: Financial assistance provided to eligible families to build pucca houses.

footer.text: Gram Panchayat Office Savarla, Taluka Pawni, Dist Bhandara is working for the holistic development of the village.
footer.address: At Post Savarla, Taluka Pawni, District Bhandara - 441910

section1.title: Panchayat Introduction
section1.para: Gram Panchayat Office Savarla, Taluka Pawni, Dist Bhandara is a local self-government body. The main objective is to provide government services, development works, and welfare schemes. Established: 1958.

section2.title: Village Info
section2.para: Savarla is a progressive agricultural village in Bhandara district. The main occupation is agriculture, with rice being the main crop. The village is progressing in social, cultural, and educational fields.

section3.title: Geographical & Economic Info
section3.para: Taluka: Pawni, District: Bhandara, PIN: 441910. Population: 2409. Area: 502.09 Hectares. Main Occupation: Agriculture, Main Crop: Rice. Address: At Post Savarla, Tal Pawni, Dist Bhandara.

political journey.title: Development Works
political journey.para1: Various development works are being implemented in the village through the Gram Panchayat. This includes roads, water supply, sanitation, public facilities, and various government schemes.
political journey.para2: Gram Panchayat Office Savarla is committed to the overall development of the village.

2009.title: Jal Jeevan Mission
2009.para: Water tap connections have been provided to every household in Savarla village.

2014.title: Roads & Infrastructure
2014.para: Internal village roads have been constructed and improved for better transportation.

2019.title: Swachh Bharat Abhiyan
2019.para: Cleanliness drives and personal/public toilets have been constructed under the Swachh Bharat Mission.

2024.title: PM Awas Yojana
2024.para: Financial assistance is being given to eligible families to build houses under PM Awas Yojana Gramin.

sports.title: Birth Certificate
sports.para1: The following services are available: Birth Certificate.
sports.para2: Required for official registration of a child's birth.
sports.para3: Process: Submit application at the GP office with necessary documents.
sports.para4: Fee Structure: Registration within 21 days — Free.

agriculture.title: Death Certificate
agriculture.para1: The following services are available: Death Certificate.

section1.title: Documents Required
section1.para: Death certificate, Aadhaar card, and application.

section2.title: Registration Process
section2.para: Submit application at Gram Panchayat office.

agriculture.para2: Contact the office for more information.

employment.title: Water Tax
employment.para1: The following services are available: Water Tax Collection.
employment.para2: Water tax is necessary for the operation of the village water supply system.
employment.para4: How to Pay: Visit the Gram Panchayat office.
employment.para5: The collected water tax fund is used for water facilities.

education.title: Property Tax
education.para1: The following services are available: Property Tax Collection.
education.para2: Property tax is essential for village development.
education.para3: Tax Rates: As per Gram Panchayat rules.
education.para4: Property tax must be paid annually.
education.para5: Visit the Gram Panchayat office for property tax payment.

section1.title: Registration Requirements
section1.para: Marriage registration is an important service provided by the Gram Panchayat.

section2.title: Documents Required
section2.para: Aadhaar cards of bride and groom, age proof, and photos.

section3.title: Registration Process
section3.para: Visit the GP office and submit the application.

section5.title: Other Government Services
section5.para: Construction permits and other government services are also available.

news.title: Documents & Downloads
news.line: Important documents and information of the Gram Panchayat.

1.title: Gram Sabha Resolutions — New resolutions are available.

2.title: Annual Report — View the annual report of the Gram Panchayat.

3.title: Budget — Development works budget is available.

5.title: Tenders — Tender notices for new development works.

6.title: Important Forms — Important forms required for various services.

gallery.title: Photo Gallery
gallery.sub-title: Village photos, Office photos, Event photos, and Development works photos

contact us.title: Contact Us
contact us.line: Fill out this form to send your questions or suggestions to the Gram Panchayat office.
contact us.address: At Post Savarla, Tal Pawni, Dist Bhandara - 441910

government schemes.title: Government Schemes
government schemes.para1: Information and benefits of various government schemes are made available to the villagers.
government schemes.para2: Contact the Gram Panchayat office to avail these schemes.
government schemes.para3: Gram Panchayat Savarla is committed to implementing government schemes.

development works.title: Development Works
development works.title2: Various Development Works in the Village
development works.para1: Various development works are being implemented in the village through the Gram Panchayat.
development works.para2: This includes development works through roads, water supply, sanitation, public facilities, and various government schemes.
development works.para3: The Gram Panchayat is committed to the overall development of the village.
development works.para4: Here is an overview of the key development areas:

1.para1: Internal village roads have been constructed and upgraded.
1.para2: Cleanliness is being maintained in the village under the Swachh Bharat Abhiyan.

2.para1: Tap connections have been provided to every household in Savarla under the Jal Jeevan Mission.

3.para1: Public facilities are being provided through various government schemes.

chatbot.welcome: Hello! I am the Gram Panchayat Savarla Assistant. How can I help you?

questions.birth_cert: How to get a Birth Certificate?
questions.death_cert: How to get a Death Certificate?

answers.birth_cert: Please contact the Gram Panchayat office for a Birth Certificate.
answers.death_cert: Please contact the Gram Panchayat office for a Death Certificate.
answers.office_hours: Office Hours: Mon–Sat 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM.
answers.water_tax: Water tax can be paid at the Gram Panchayat office.
answers.property_tax: Property tax can be paid at the Gram Panchayat office.
answers.schemes: Schemes: PM Awas Yojana, MGNREGA, Jal Jeevan Mission, Swachh Bharat Abhiyan.
answers.gram_sabha: Information regarding Gram Sabha is available at the office.
